steps.title: Identify the structure
steps.content: The text opens with a generalization: I have always noticed that it is the fixed idea of each member of the crew that he is doing everything. It then offers specific examples: Harris thinks he alone worked; George thinks he himself did everything.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Choice C describes exactly this — a generalization followed by supporting examples from a specific situation (the boat trip).

A is wrong: the narrator doesn't seem startled — he's noticed this always. B is wrong: there's no challenge being navigated. D is wrong: the narrator describes others' overconfidence, not his own.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
